item.title: 谷歌Gemini 3.6 Flash模型在长周期工程任务中降低AI智能体Token成本高达65%——3.5 Pro即将推出
item.summary: Google DeepMindtoday released three new proprietary AI models it says are among its most token-efficient yet: Gemini 3.6 Flash, Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite, and Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber. The models aim to make AI agents faster, smarter, and cheaper at scale. Google is pricing Gemini 3.6 Flash at $1.50 per one million input tok
